commons.name: Charm of Insight
commons.description: First turn of each battle: intent always honest.

commons.name: Healing Herb
commons.description: Heal 3 HP at end of each battle.

rares.name: Frostbite Shard
rares.description: On SLASH win: 10% chance enemy frozen 1 turn.

rares.name: Phoenix Ember
rares.description: 1x/battle: when HP drops below 20%, heal 15 HP.

rares.name: Berserker Stone
rares.description: SLASH dmg +5, BUT +2 self-dmg/round for first 5 rounds.

rares.name: Mirror Shield
rares.description: GUARD win reflects 50% incoming dmg back.

rares.name: Time Glass
rares.description: 1x/battle: re-pick action knowing enemy move (guaranteed RPS win) BUT dmg dealt 50%.

rares.name: Gamblers Dice
rares.description: +30 energy each battle start, BUT -10 max HP for run.

rares.name: Iron Will
rares.description: 1x/battle: ignore one boss SCHEME (treat as honest).

rares.name: Chained Grimoire
rares.description: COUNTER dmg +6, BUT lose 5 energy per turn.

rares.name: Runic Compass
rares.description: Reveal next 2 floor node types on map.

epics.name: Pact of Shadows
epics.description: +30 max HP for run, BUT -2 self-dmg per SLASH win.

epics.name: Echo Stone
epics.description: Win RPS with same basic action 2+ turns in a row -> +25% dmg. Resets on action change, RPS loss, or draw. Basic RPS only.

epics.name: Serpent Belt
epics.description: Every 5th turn: take 0 dmg AND deal 2x dmg.

epics.name: Golden Chalice
epics.description: Start each battle at 50% HP cap, BUT double gold from all sources.

epics.name: Crown of Decision
epics.description: Every 3rd turn = Crown Turn: ALL dmg x1.5 both sides. Intent uses chapter honesty (can lie).

epics.name: Eye of Omniscience
epics.description: First 2 turns of battle: intent always honest. Enemy +10% dmg whole battle.

epics.name: Void Crown
epics.description: READ action: -20 energy cost, reveals next 2 intents honest. Next attack after READ +10% dmg IF you win the RPS exchange.

epics.name: Heart of Nimblade
epics.description: When HP drops to 0: revive at 30 HP. 1x per run.

special.name: Nimiq Crystal
special.description: Convert leftover energy at end of each battle into +1 gold each. CH2 Crystal Shrine node only, 50 gold purchase.
